overview: EveryMoment is a mobile-first web app for capturing, organizing, and sharing event-centric memories. Users create Moments (weddings, parties, milestones) where media, people, and interactions come together in one beautiful, immersive place. Features a Liquid Glass UI with cinematic animations, masonry explore grid, and seamless social features.
features: Liquid Glass UI with glass morphism cards and parallax scroll
Pinterest-style masonry Explore page with infinite scroll
Cinematic moment detail with full-bleed hero and animated tabs
Conversation-style Memories feed with full media support
Calendar view with glass pill toggles and day drawer
Event Pass QR code for attending users
Advanced Explore filters with Near Me location detection
Admin dashboard with CSV bulk import
Editable profile with dynamic payment details
Light/dark mode with animated glass theme toggle
